MAP:OTHH 16L/16R - STARS TEXT

FOLDER:ASP DOHA FIR

ACTIVE:RWY:ARR:OTHH16L:*:DEP:*:*

FONTSIZE:=:10.5

TEXT:ALKAN:FL200+:+10:+10
